name: material-ui-theming
tagline: Guides Material UI theme creation and design tokens: createTheme, color schemes, CSS variables, dark mode, and TS augmentation.
verdict: Compact, well-scoped reference skill that defers bulk detail to AGENTS.md/reference.md, is versioned, and states clear trigger situations. Only real gap: no stated exclusions for when not to use it.

highlights.summary: No "NOT for" or exclusion text anywhere in description or body.
